name: botgenealogia
description: Motor local de deducao temporal, scraping genealogico e analise por IA.

scripts.test:familysearch: set HEADLESS=false&& set AI_PROVIDER=none&& node scripts/test-familysearch.js
scripts.search:web:pdf:tiny: set WEB_SEARCH_MAX_QUERIES=1&& set WEB_COLLECT_MAX_PAGES=1&& set WEB_MAX_PEOPLE_PER_RUN=1&& node scripts/search-web.js --source=pdf
scripts.search:web:pdf:small: set WEB_SEARCH_MAX_QUERIES=2&& set WEB_COLLECT_MAX_PAGES=3&& set WEB_MAX_PEOPLE_PER_RUN=3&& node scripts/search-web.js --source=pdf
scripts.search:web:pdf:queue: set WEB_MAX_PEOPLE_PER_RUN=5&& set WEB_MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_RUN=15&& set WEB_SEARCH_MAX_QUERIES=1&& set WEB_COLLECT_MAX_PAGES=1&& node scripts/search-web.js --source=pdf --cloud-safe --continue-on-skip
scripts.doctor: node -e "require('./src/logic'); require('./src/ai'); require('./src/scraper'); require('./src/queryGenerator'); require('./src/webSearch'); require('./src/webCollector'); require('./src/sourceClassifier'); require('./src/cooldown'); require('./src/preCollectScoring'); require('./src/searchStrength'); require('./src/familyContext'); require('./src/researchPlanner'); require('./src/contextEnricher'); require('./src/resultStatus'); require('./src/progressStore'); require('./src/siteExtractors/google'); require('./src/siteExtractors/bing'); require('./src/siteExtractors/duckduckgo'); console.log('OK')"
